raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX I began filing for damages done during my Best Buy delivery. I have sent pictures I have been on line at least 10 times. Nothing is being done. I have been told numerous times they are going to escalate my claim and someone will call me. This has never happened.I have gone into the store I am told to go online to file a claim. The circle continues.

2.

I returned all 4 items to Best Buy three of the items were canceled before delivery and only a portion of the appliances were refunded fully.

Best Buy has charged by CitiBank Best Buy card for items I do not have.
